title: Use Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking
breadcrumbs: Use Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking
text: Use Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking To use the SYB connector with row-level, data pages, or all pages locking: Create tables for the user modeld. For more information, see Create Tables for Modeled Entities . Add the row level locks , datapages locking , or allpages locking connector option to your assignment file. Stop and restart the Sybase SQL server. Related Links row level locks Create tables with row level locking. datapages locking Create tables with data pages locking. allpages locking Create tables with all pages locking.
